tools.name: pumpfun_build_payment
tools.description: Build a Solana payment transaction for a tokenized pump.fun agent. Returns a base64-encoded unsigned transaction and an intent_id. The user must sign and broadcast the transaction, then call pumpfun_verify_payment.

agent_id.description: The agent's ID (from the agent manifest or context)

amount.description: Payment amount in smallest units (e.g. 6 decimals for USDC: 1000000 = 1 USDC)

tools.name: pumpfun_verify_payment
tools.description: Confirm that a payment transaction landed on-chain and mark the invoice as paid.

tx_signature.description: The Solana transaction signature after broadcast
